data.title: merge-to-main.sh: relative path at line 58 -> violates no-relative-paths check
data.description:
## Incident Overview
merge-to-main.sh line 58 uses a relative path: _MERGE_HELPERS_LIB="${_SCRIPT_DIR}/../hooks/lib/merge-helpers.sh". This violates the plugin scripts no-relative-paths invariant and causes test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh to fail.
